evals.prompt: Help me set up a resume version management system. I have applied to 8 companies with 3 different resume versions and I can't remember which version I sent to which company. I need a system to track versions, tailored applications, and which version was sent where.
evals.expected_output: A structured resume version management system with tracking approach and retrospective organization
expectations: Output recommends a naming convention for resume versions
Output creates a tracking system (table or log format) for applications
Output helps retrospectively organize the existing 3 versions
Output includes fields for: company, role, version sent, date, status

evals.prompt: I have a master resume and 5 tailored versions for different job families: startup PM, enterprise PM, consulting, product operations, and general management. Design a version control workflow so I can easily update all versions when my master changes.
evals.expected_output: A version control workflow with update process and master-to-tailored sync strategy
expectations: Output documents the master → tailored relationship clearly
Output creates an update checklist for when the master changes
Output defines which sections are 'always tailored' vs 'synced from master'
Output recommends a version history log format
Output addresses how to track what was changed between versions
